description_long: This is a compact submachine gun with a digital camouflage finish, featuring a boxy metal receiver and a prominent detachable magazine. The weapon has a short barrel with a threaded muzzle, and a simple wire folding stock attached to the rear. A visible charging handle is located on the top, and a trigger guard encloses the trigger beneath the receiver. The magazine is shown removed and positioned beside the gun, with a single brass cartridge floating above, indicating the loading mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external embellishments and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, digital-camouflage submachine gun with a detachable magazine, wire folding stock, and short threaded barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the digital camo finish, wire folding stock, and magazine removed with a cartridge above.
description_view_1: Front-top view highlighting the barrel opening, magazine well, and cartridge above the magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, folding stock, and magazine well.
description_view_3: Rear-top view focusing on the back of the receiver, wire stock, and magazine beside the gun.
